title: QSP Product Contract Compatibility Policy
purpose: Define backward-compatible verification rules for QSP product contracts.

compatibility_rules.title: Known version required
compatibility_rules.description: A contract must declare a known spec_version.

compatibility_rules.title: Core layers must remain present
compatibility_rules.description: input_layer, decision_layer, enforcement_layer, and exposure_layer must exist across compatible versions.

compatibility_rules.title: Decision semantics must be stable
compatibility_rules.description: Decision values must remain within accept, pending, reject.

compatibility_rules.title: Fail-closed semantics must be preserved
compatibility_rules.description: Compatible versions must preserve explicit fail_closed meaning.

compatibility_rules.title: Public status must remain derivable
compatibility_rules.description: A compatible contract must still expose a public verification status.

future_version_policy.minor_version: May add fields without removing required core semantics.
future_version_policy.major_version: May change structure, but must ship a compatibility adapter or migration verifier.
